Title: Data & Analytics Engineer
Description:
To support the growth of our client base and the evolution of our data platform, we are looking for a Data & Analytics Engineer with 2–4 years of experience who can become a key reference point for data analysis and contribute to the development of our data infrastructure.

The role will work closely with the Tech, Product, and Business teams and will be responsible for:


Verifying, certifying, and continuously monitoring the quality and reliability of data collected by our proprietary systems
Extracting, transforming, and validating data from relational databases (MS SQL, Postgres) and non-relational databases (Cassandra)
Supporting the design and maintenance of data pipelines (ETL/ELT) using Python and Databricks
Performing exploratory analysis on complex datasets (mobility, flows, spatio-temporal data)
Identifying patterns, anomalies, missing data, and relevant trends
Producing structured reports (mobility reports, custom client analyses, internal analyses)
Extracting high-value insights from collected data
Preparing and presenting analyses and results to clients, with strong storytelling skills and the ability to translate data into actionable recommendations



The goal is to evolve the role toward increasing autonomy in managing the full data lifecycle: collection, validation, modeling, analysis, and reporting.

MUST HAVE


Strong knowledge of key languages and frameworks for data analysis / data engineering (Python, Pandas, etc.)
Familiarity with object-oriented programming
Strong knowledge of SQL-based relational databases
Ability to write complex queries and work with structured datasets
Good command of English (written and spoken)



NICE TO HAVE


2–4 years of experience in data analytics and/or data engineering
Experience designing or maintaining data pipelines (ETL/ELT)
Knowledge of data visualization tools (Plotly, Seaborn)
Experience with highly spatio-temporal datasets (time series, geolocated data, mobility data)
Experience with non-relational databases (e.g., Cassandra)
Familiarity with cloud environments



What We Offer


Technical and professional growth opportunities in an innovative, high-tech environment
The opportunity to take on increasing responsibility in strategic projects
A dynamic, interdisciplinary, and results-driven workplace
Location: Milan (MM Precotto) / hybrid work model (work from home available)



Resumes must include written authorization for the processing of personal data in accordance with GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).

Blimp is an equal opportunity employer: this job posting is open to all genders in accordance with Italian Legislative Decree no. 198/2006.

Title: Data Analytics Specialist
Description:
Job description:

We are looking for a motivated Data Analyst to join our ICT Team and contribute to our Artificial Intelligence initiatives.
If you're eager to learn, passionate about data and technology, and excited to work in a multicultural and dynamic environment, this could be the perfect opportunity for you.
Key Responsibilities:

Collaborate with business and technology leaders to define the AI strategy for data analytics, focusing on decision support and predictive capabilities


Evaluate and contribute to the selection and implementation of the AI-powered analytics platform, ensuring alignment with Tenova's strategic goals


Explore and prototype AI/ML models to extract insights from structured and unstructured data, supporting strategic planning and operational excellence


Support the transition from legacy systems (e.g., SAP BW) by ensuring continuity of data access and quality, while driving innovation through new platforms


Design and deliver interactive dashboards and visualizations (Power BI or similar) to communicate insights effectively to stakeholders


Ensure data governance, security, and compliance across all analytics and AI initiatives




Required Qualifications:

Solid experience with SAP Business Warehouse (data modeling, ETL, reporting)


Strong understanding of data analytics architectures, with interest or experience in AI/ML applications


Familiarity with Power BI or other BI tools is a plus


Strategic mindset with the ability to translate business needs into data-driven solutions


Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills


Fluent in English

Workplace: Castellanza (VA)

Title: Data Analyst - Italian & English speaker
Description:
Job Description

Join our team and start a new adventure in an international and dynamic environment, where you will be able to fulfil your career expectations in a fast-growing organization.

As a Data Analyst Consultant at Amaris Consulting, you will play a key role in designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines and solutions that support critical business decisions. You will work hands-on with Azure data flow management, pipeline creation, and credential access configuration to ensure data security and consistency.

Your Missions



Design, develop, and maintain data pipelines using Azure Data Factory
Manage and monitor data flows across cloud environments
Extract, transform, and load (ETL) data into SQL databases
Model and structure data to enable analysis and reporting
Implement and maintain secure access and credential management within Azure
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support business intelligence initiatives
Proactively identify opportunities to optimize data processes and performance
Provide technical support and documentation for data solutions



Your Profile



Experience in data analysis, data integration, and data flow management
Proven knowledge of SQL and relational database concepts
Experience with Azure services, particularly Data Factory, SQL Database, and Data Lake (preferred)
Familiarity with ETL/ELT processes and data modeling techniques
Academic background: Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Information Technology, or related field
English fluent. Italian is a plus.
You demonstrate strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work autonomously
You demonstrate a proactive attitude, curiosity, and a genuine desire to learn and grow in the field
You demonstrate excellent communication and interpersonal skills
You demonstrate the ability to collaborate in a multicultural environment
Based in or near Milan (or willing to work in the area)



What We Offer



An international community bringing together 110+ different nationalities
An environment where trust has a central place: 70% of our key leaders started their careers at the first level of responsibilities
A robust training system with our internal Academy and 250+ available modules
A vibrant workplace that frequently gathers for internal events (afterworks, team buildings, etc.)
At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Every day, our teams bring our ESG commitments to life, from reducing our footprint to driving positive change within our communities. Through our WeCare Together program, you’ll be empowered to design and lead projects that create real social or environmental impact, with the company’s full support.



Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics.

Who are we?

Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.

At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like:

Brief Call: Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!

Case study: Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc.

As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience.

We look forward to meeting you!

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
CHI SIAMO

AGAP2 è un gruppo europeo di consulenza ingegneristica operativa facente parte del Gruppo MoOngy.

Presente in 14 paesi europei con oltre 9.000 dipendenti, abbiamo aperto circa sette anni fa la nostra prima sede italiana a Milano. Grazie alla continua crescita del gruppo, siamo costantemente alla ricerca di professionisti che condividano i nostri valori: AMBIZIONE, SORRISO, DINAMISMO, VOGLIA DI METTERSI IN GIOCO, all’interno di una realtà in continua evoluzione dove le relazioni umane sono sempre al primo posto.




Ruolo

Siamo alla ricerca di un Energy Data Engineer da inserire all'interno di progetti innovativi in ambito Energy & Sustainability.

La risorsa contribuirà allo sviluppo di soluzioni digitali avanzate per il monitoraggio, l'analisi e l'ottimizzazione delle performance energetiche di edifici e impianti complessi, collaborando con team multidisciplinari composti da Energy Engineer, Data Scientist e specialisti HVAC.

L'attività si svolgerà in modalità ibrida presso la sede del cliente a Seriate (BG).




Cosa farai:

Analizzare dati energetici e HVAC per individuare opportunità di efficientamento e ottimizzazione.
Sviluppare modelli digitali (Digital Twin) e algoritmi predittivi per il monitoraggio delle performance energetiche.
Realizzare dashboard e strumenti di reportistica avanzata a supporto delle decisioni operative.
Collaborare con team multidisciplinari per sviluppare soluzioni innovative in ambito Energy & Sustainability.




Cosa richiediamo:

Laurea in Ingegneria Energetica, Informatica, Fisica o discipline affini.
Esperienza di almeno 2-3 anni in ambito Energy Data Analytics.
Buona conoscenza di sistemi HVAC e impianti energetici.
Ottima conoscenza di Python e dei principali strumenti di analisi dati.
Esperienza con Power BI, Tableau o strumenti equivalenti.
Attitudine al problem solving e forte orientamento all'analisi dei dati.




Cosa offriamo?

Contratto a tempo indeterminato e/o collaborazione in Partita IVA;
Retribuzione commisurata all’esperienza e alle competenze maturate;
Percorsi di formazione tecnica e manageriale;
Follow-up costanti con il team HR e con il proprio Business Manager;
Piano di crescita professionale strutturato;
Inserimento in un ambiente dinamico, internazionale e in continua crescita.




La retribuzione per questo ruolo è compresa tra 40.000 € e 50.000 €.

La posizione è inquadrata nell’ambito del CCNL Commercio e Terziario applicato dalla nostra società.

Il posizionamento all’interno del range sarà definito in base alle competenze tecniche, all’esperienza specifica nel ruolo e agli esiti del processo di selezione, secondo criteri oggettivi e neutri.

In presenza di profili con caratteristiche eccezionali rispetto al range indicato, potrà essere valutata una revisione previa approvazione interna.




The world needs you!

AGAP2 è un equal opportunities employer: crediamo che tutte le forme di diversità siano fonte di arricchimento reciproco. Ci impegniamo a garantire un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, nel quale ogni singola risorsa possa apportare un valore unico alla nostra realtà.

Accogliamo candidature senza distinzione di età, genere, nazionalità, disabilità, orientamento sessuale, religione o stato civile.

Prestiamo inoltre particolare attenzione alle candidature appartenenti alle categorie protette ai sensi degli articoli 1 e 18 della Legge 68/99.

Title: Data Analyst (Rif. 2026-181)
Description:
aizoOn, società di tecnologia e consulenza, indipendente, operante a livello globale, ricerca un / a Data Analyst.







Sarà coinvolto/a nell'ambito di progetti per un importante cliente in ambito Finance, occupandosi delle seguenti attività:




Collaborare ai progetti data-driven, supportando l’intero ciclo di vita delle soluzioni: dalla raccolta dei requisiti business all’analisi tecnico-funzionale, fino alla progettazione, allo sviluppo e alla messa in produzione
Redigere la documentazione tecnica e funzionale, garantendo una mappatura chiara e completa delle informazioni presenti nel Data Warehouse
Raccogliere le esigenze di business e delle varie funzioni interne al fine di sviluppare soluzioni adeguate nel rispetto delle best practices
Gestire le attività di esercizio e manutenzione applicativa della piattaforma, garantendone il corretto utilizzo, favorendo l’automazione e il miglioramento continuo dei processi IT




PROFILO




Laurea in discipline tecnico-scientifiche (Informatica, Ingegneria, Matematica, Fisica, Statistica o affini)
Almeno 3 anni di esperienza nel ruolo




COMPETENZE TECNICHE




Esperienza nell’analisi dei dati su database relazionali, con particolare attenzione alle tecnologie Oracle, e conoscenza dei principali oggetti database (tabelle, viste, indici, partizioni, procedure, sinonimi)
Ottima padronanza del linguaggio SQL
Competenze nella modellazione dei dati a livello concettuale, logico e fisico
Conoscenza dei principali temi di data governance (data quality, data lineage, data dictionary, business glossary, ecc.)
Costituisce un plus la familiarità con Oracle Data Integrator e con strumenti di Business Intelligence come Power BI.







SEDE DI LAVORO




Milano

E' richiesta la presenza 3 giorni a settimana presso sede cliente.










The job search refers to candidates of both genders

Title: SAP Data & Analytics Specialist
Description:
In Accenture, potrai portare la tua visione innovativa al cuore del cambiamento, lavorando con le aziende più importanti a livello mondiale per trasformare interi settori di mercato. Modella il futuro del business e della tecnologia sviluppando soluzioni all'avanguardia in grado di generare nuovo valore.

Il tuo ruolo e le tue prospettive

Entra a far parte del nostro network internazionale di talenti Technology in ambito SAP. Lavorerai con tecnologie innovative su progetti entusiasmanti, sviluppando per le aziende più importanti percorsi personalizzati verso le nuove soluzioni SAP, dalle roadmap digitali fino alle trasformazioni funzionali e di settore. In particolare, potrai:



Analizzare i requisiti di business e tradurli in modelli dati e soluzioni analitiche

Progettare e implementare modelli dati e processi di trasformazione

Sviluppare dashboard e report avanzati per supportare le decisioni di business

Collaborare con team multidisciplinari per definire soluzioni Data & Analytics

Supportare la definizione e l’evoluzione della roadmap Data & Analytics dei clienti, contribuendo a iniziative di innovazione



Se condividi la nostra passione per le soluzioni SAP e hai le seguenti caratteristiche, ti stiamo aspettando:



Esperienza di 2–5 anni in progetti Data & Analytics in ambito SAP.

Esperienza pratica in SAP BTP, Datasphere, SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) e SAP BW/4HANA, con conoscenza dei processi ETL complessi.

Competenza nello sviluppo di dashboard e report in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) con visualizzazioni avanzate.

Capacità di analisi dei dati e problem solving, con attenzione alla qualità e coerenza dei dati.

Orientamento al lavoro di squadra e capacità di collaborare con team multidisciplinari su progetti complessi.



Rappresentano un plus:



Passione per l’AI e la Generative AI, con interesse nell’applicarne le potenzialità a soluzioni innovative in ambito Data & Analytics

Conoscenza di SAP S/4HANA e SAP ECC per comprendere i processi aziendali

Title: Analista Dati & Software Developer
Description:
Chi cerchiamo

Siamo alla ricerca di una figura tecnica versatile da inserire nel nostro team per lo sviluppo di soluzioni software, l'analisi dei dati e l'integrazione di sistemi hardware e industriali.

La persona ideale possiede solide basi scientifiche e informatiche, curiosità tecnologica e passione per la sperimentazione, con interesse verso l'automazione, l'IoT, l'intelligenza artificiale e l'analisi avanzata dei dati.

Attività principali
Sviluppo e manutenzione di applicazioni software in Python e C++.
Analisi, elaborazione e visualizzazione di dati provenienti da sensori, impianti e sistemi informativi.
Progettazione e gestione di database SQL.
Integrazione di dispositivi e sistemi tramite protocolli di comunicazione industriali e IoT (MQTT, Modbus, HTTP/REST).
Sviluppo di modelli statistici e di machine learning per analisi predittive e supporto alle decisioni.
Configurazione e sviluppo di soluzioni basate su Raspberry Pi, Arduino e sistemi embedded.
Installazione, configurazione e gestione di ambienti Linux.
Collaborazione con il team per la progettazione e realizzazione di nuovi prodotti e prototipi.
Requisiti
Laurea in discipline STEM (Ingegneria, Fisica, Informatica, Matematica o affini).
Buona conoscenza di Python e librerie di Machine Learning / Data Analysis (ad esempio Pandas, Numpy, Scipy, TensorFlow, PyTorch, …)
Conoscenza di base/intermedia di C++ o altro linguaggio (es. RUST, Go, Javascript / Typescript).
Conoscenza di OOP, principali strutture dati e design pattern.
Esperienza con database relazionali e linguaggio SQL. sperienza con database relazionali e linguaggio SQL nella progettazione di strutture dati e schemi SQL con consapevolezza dei principali fattori che influenzano le performance
Familiarità con protocolli di comunicazione quali MQTT, Modbus e HTTP/REST.
Conoscenza dei sistemi operativi Linux e familiarità bash
Competenze di analisi dati, statistica e modellazione, conoscenza delle principali famiglie di modelli ML e dei fattori che ne influenzano la scelta.
Capacità di lavorare in autonomia e di affrontare problemi complessi in modo strutturato.
Requisiti preferenziali
Conoscenza approfondita di modelli di reti neurali problem-specific (LSTM, GRU,...)
Conoscenza di piattaforme embedded e hardware elettronico (Raspberry Pi, Arduino o equivalenti).
Conoscenza dei principali framework di rappresentazione grafica dei dati
Familiarità con Git e GitHub.
Esperienza in contesti IoT, automazione industriale o monitoraggio remoto.
Conoscenza base di Docker e Docker Compose per il deploy di applicativi in ambienti containerizzati
Cosa apprezziamo particolarmente
Interesse genuino per la tecnologia e l'innovazione.
Presenza di progetti personali, attività maker, contributi open-source o sperimentazioni indipendenti.
Attitudine all'apprendimento continuo.
Spirito pratico, curiosità e capacità di trasformare idee in prototipi funzionanti.
Flessibilità mentale e interdisciplinarietà

Cosa offriamo:

Tempo pieno (part-time considerato in casi eccezionali)
Modello di lavoro ibrido (2 giorni al mese in sede - Piacenza)

Chi è Dabohn:

Startup operante nel mondo dell'AI industriale con crescita organica e senza investitori. Adotta un'organizzazione di tipo Teal, stimola un pensiero critico e creativo e lascia ampio spazio alla gestione autonoma del proprio lavoro.

Title: Data Analyst Specialist
Description:
Chi siamo

In Mavriq, parte di Moltiply Group, aiutiamo le persone a fare la scelta giusta - che si tratti di un mutuo, un’assicurazione, una fornitura di energia o un piano telefonico. I nostri brand, tra cui MutuiOnline.it, Segugio.it, SOStariffe.it, Trovaprezzi.it, Switcho, e realtà internazionali come LeLynx.fr, Rastreator.com, Pricewise.nl e Verivox.de, offrono chiarezza in mercati spesso complessi e poco trasparenti. Crediamo nel potere dei dati, nella trasparenza e nell’innovazione - perché cambiare le regole, quando non funzionano al meglio, è nel nostro DNA.




Posizione

Stiamo cercando un/una Data Analyst Specialist che si unisca al nostro team per garantire l’integrità, l’affidabilità e la coerenza dei dati all’interno dei nostri sistemi. La figura avrà un ruolo chiave nel monitoraggio continuo dei rilasci, nella verifica della qualità dei dati e nell'identificazione tempestiva di anomalie o scostamenti rispetto agli standard attesi.

L’obiettivo principale è assicurare che i dati rimangano accurati, completi e allineati ai requisiti di business, supportando i team tecnici e operativi nelle attività di controllo e miglioramento continuo.




Cosa offriamo

Crediamo che la crescita nasca dall’incontro tra curiosità e autonomia. Offriamo un ambiente ibrido e flessibile, formazione continua e spazio per sperimentare, imparare e migliorare. Lavorerai in un team con cui condividerai successi, affronterai sfide e raggiungerai risultati. A completare il quadro, un pacchetto di benefit solido: assicurazione sanitaria (CCNL Commercio), buoni pasto, welfare, e accesso a piattaforme di e-learning.




Dove lavorerai

La nostra sede è in Via Desenzano 2, Milano (MM1 Gambara). Lavoriamo in modalità ibrida: almeno due giorni a settimana in ufficio e fino a tre in smart working. I momenti in presenza sono fondamentali per confrontarci, scambiare idee e alimentare la cultura di squadra che ci distingue.




Cosa Farai

Monitorare regolarmente i rilasci applicativi e valutare l’impatto sui dati.
Eseguire controlli di qualità dei dati (Data Quality Check) su base periodica e on-demand.
Identificare anomalie, inconsistenze e deviazioni rispetto ai benchmark attesi.
Collaborare con i team di sviluppo, prodotto e business per risolvere eventuali problemi legati ai dati.
Creare e mantenere report, dashboard e metriche di monitoraggio della data quality.
Documentare processi, controlli e risultati delle analisi.
Contribuire alla definizione e implementazione di regole di Data Quality e flussi di monitoraggio automatizzato.
Proporre soluzioni e miglioramenti ai processi di gestione del dato.




Requisiti

Ottima conoscenza di SQL e capacità di interrogare database complessi.
Buona conoscenza di strumenti di data visualization (es. Power BI, Tableau).
Esperienza con Excel e strumenti di analisi.
Familiarità con processi di ETL, data pipeline e concetti di data governance.
Conoscenza dei principali indicatori di Data Quality (accuratezza, completezza, coerenza, tempestività, unicità).
Laurea in discipline STEM (Informatica, Statistica, Matematica, Ingegneria o affini).
1–3 anni di esperienza in ruoli simili (Data Analyst, Data Quality Specialist, Business Analyst).
Conoscenza del ciclo di vita del software e gestione dei rilasci (nice to have).




Altre informazioni

In Mavriq non diamo nulla per scontato: pensiamo, testiamo, impariamo.

Ogni giorno è un giorno uno, e ogni sfida è un’occasione per migliorare.

Se ti rivedi in questo approccio, non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti.




(La ricerca è rivolta a candidati di entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle Leggi n. 903/77 e n. 125/91.)

Title: Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering
Description:
About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn’t stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives. By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.

What You'll Be Doing

As our Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering, you’ll be the person who drives our data strategy and enhances decision-making by developing scalable data assets and AI-powered workflows. You will join the Growth & Marketing (G&M) B2C Analytics team, which sits at the heart of our department with the mission to put intelligence first in every decision. Here's what your day-to-day will look like:


Lead Design Data Architecture – Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer by designing robust data models and building pipelines that integrate into the company's federated data strategy, ensuring scalable and governed data ownership.
Define AI Agentic Workflows – Design and implement AI-powered agentic workflows for data transformation and exploration, accelerating analytical capabilities and enabling self-service for key stakeholders.
Build High-Impact Visualisation Tools – Define key metrics and develop dashboards and reports (using tools like Hex or Looker) that communicate analytical insights effectively.
Drive Decision-Making Through Data – Analyse complex datasets to identify patterns impacting the consumer funnel (Acquisition, Engagement, Retention, Monetisation) and partner with Marketing Managers to maximise ROI.
Partner with Key Stakeholders – Act as a strategic partner for Marketing, Finance, Operations, and Product, bridging the gap between technical data and business goals.
Drive Testing Initiatives – Own the end-to-end testing pipeline, from opportunity identification to experiment design and recommendation delivery.


Who We're Looking For

We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?


Relevant Experience – 5+ years in data-related roles (Data Engineering, Analytics, BI) with at least 3 years of hands-on experience in high-volume or big data environments.
Technical Proficiency – Strong command of SQL, dbt, and Python. Experience with Git and notebook-based analytics (e.g., Jupyter) is a plus.
Data Modelling & Mesh Expertise – Hands-on experience in data modelling, ETL, data governance, and Data Mesh implementation at scale.
AI Fluency — Comfortable using AI tools day-to-day for analytics, automation, and generating ad-hoc analyses, C-level summaries, marketing campaign suggestions, and business cases efficiently using AI agents. Basic to mid-level proficiency with Claude is a strong plus. Experience interacting with agents programmatically via APIs is a plus.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills – Comfortable with ambiguity, able to break down complex problems into focused workstreams and deliver evidence-based answers.
Stakeholder Management & Communication – Able to independently lead initiatives across diverse business domains and translate technical findings into clear, actionable recommendations.
Digital Consumer Lifecycle Knowledge – Solid understanding of consumer lifecycle (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Churn) and user economics (ARPU, CAC, LTV).


CareAbout: how we support your impact

About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It’s a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we’re committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That’s why we created CareAbout:

❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)

💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you’re moving countries)

⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)

🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)

👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)


We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.


Salary: €40,000 - €54,000 gross per annum

This range is set using objective, gender-neutral criteria for the role's core requirements. However, we do not believe in putting a ceiling on talent. The final compensation package is tailored according to your unique experience and expertise. If your skills go beyond the standard profile, apply anyway so we can discuss a package that reflects your true value.

Equal opportunity employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn More About Us

Our values and pillars aren’t just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

By submitting this application, I acknowledge that I have read and understood the content of the Privacy Policy

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It’s a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we’re committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That’s why we created CareAbout:

❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)

💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you’re moving countries)

⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)

🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)

👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)

  • We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.

Salary: €40,000 - €54,000 gross per annum

This range is set using objective, gender-neutral criteria for the role's core requirements. However, we do not believe in putting a ceiling on talent. The final compensation package is tailored according to your unique experience and expertise. If your skills go beyond the standard profile, apply anyway so we can discuss a package that reflects your true value.

Equal opportunity employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn More About Us

Our values and pillars aren’t just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

Title: Business Intelligence Developer
HTML:
Aubay è una società leader in Europa nelle aree di consulenza direzionale e ICT, quotata al mercato NYSE Euronext di Parigi.



La nostra Proposta:

Siamo alla ricerca di un* Business Intelligence Developer.

Sarai responsabile della progettazione, sviluppo e manutenzione di soluzioni di Business Intelligence basate su Power BI, con l’obiettivo di trasformare dati complessi in informazioni chiare, affidabili e utili al processo decisionale aziendale.

Nello specifico, le attività riguarderanno:

  • progettazione e sviluppo di report e dashboard interattive in Power BI;
  • utilizzo di Power Query per la preparazione, pulizia e trasformazione dei dati;
  • sviluppo di query SQL per l’estrazione e la trasformazione dei dati da database relazionali e altre sorgenti;
  • creazione di misure e KPI complessi tramite DAX;
  • supporto all’evoluzione delle architetture BI.


Requisiti richiesti:

  • Esperienza di almeno 2 anni nel ruolo;
  • Ottima conoscenza di Power BI (Desktop e Service) per sviluppo report e dashboard;
  • Ottima conoscenza di SQL;
  • Buona conoscenza di DAX e Power Query;


Modalità Operativa:

Le attività verranno svolte da remoto.


Compensation & Benefit:

La proposta economica sarà valutata rispetto alla seniority e alle competenze del candidato.

RAL 33000 - 41000 + buoni pasto.


Iter di Selezione:

Il percorso di selezione prevede un primo approfondimento conoscitivo/motivazionale con il referente HR dedicato e una successiva fase di valutazione e presentazione delle tematiche tecnico/progettuali.

Gli incontri sono da intendersi prevalentemente gestibili online, a cui si può aggiungere o sostituire un incontro in presenza sulle nostre sedi.



Il presente annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91 e a persone di tutte le età e tutte le nazionalità, ai sensi dei d.lvi 215 e 216/03.

Aubay – Ahead of innovation

Title: Analista Dati & Strumenti
Description:
La nostra ambizione è proteggere i capolavori dell’umanità e fare in modo che possano essere trasmessi alle generazioni future. Lavoriamo ogni giorno per aiutare i musei a realizzare questa ambizione.

Goppion SpA è leader nel mercato della progettazione, produzione e installazione di teche realizzate su misura per i Musei più prestigiosi al mondo. Riconosciuta per la qualità e l’innovazione delle proprie realizzazioni, Goppion rappresenta un marchio affermato a livello internazionale, che si identifica nei valori di soddisfazione totale del cliente, design customizzato e relazione duratura con i clienti.

See more at: http://www.goppion.com

Per rafforzare ulteriormente la propria struttura organizzativa in questa fase di continua espansione, la Società intende inserire uno/una Analista dati & Strumenti.




Finalità complessiva del ruolo




Costruire e mantenere l’apparato dati e strumentale, assistito dall’intelligenza artificiale, che sostiene la computazione dei costi e il controllo degli economics, liberando l’ente dal lavoro meccanico su tabelle e dati.
Assicurare che gli strumenti di intelligenza artificiale operino sempre validati contro le regole e le serie storiche di Goppion, a servizio del giudizio e mai in sua sostituzione.




Responsabilità operative




Strutturare e mantenere le tabelle di costo e le serie storiche di commessa, la memoria attuariale dell’azienda, garantendone integrità, tracciabilità e aggiornamento.
Impostare e governare gli strumenti di intelligenza artificiale per la ricerca, la correlazione e la riconciliazione di massa dei dati di costo, sottoponendone sistematicamente gli esiti a validazione.
Tradurre i criteri di stima e i giudizi del Responsabile in regole operative che lo strumento possa applicare, assicurando la coerenza tra l’automazione e la grammatica tecnica di Goppion.
Automatizzare le elaborazioni ripetitive e fare emergere le eccezioni e gli scostamenti che richiedono il giudizio del preventivista, in collaborazione con l’ufficio Sistemi di Ingegneria, i PM e l’Ufficio Acquisti.
Garantire, nelle fasi di avvio e di avanzamento dei progetti, la disponibilità e l’affidabilità del dato a supporto dell’aggiornamento delle stime (PRI → PRA) e delle offerte.
Presidiare la riservatezza, la sicurezza e la conservazione dei dati e delle serie storiche, patrimonio competitivo dell’azienda.
Supportare attivamente l’Ufficio Preventivi nelle richieste di offerta ai fornitori, nella preparazione dei file, nelle comparazioni economiche e nella preparazione delle offerte.
Redigere lo storico delle offerte ricevute e aggiornare i listini prezzi in accordo con il Responsabile e l’Ufficio Acquisti.




Rappresentano prerequisiti di ruolo




Laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia, Statistica, Matematica, Informatica. In alternativa alla laurea, sarà valutata positivamente una comprovata esperienza pluriennale in ruoli analoghi.
3-4 anni di esperienza in ruoli legati ad analisi dati, cost analysis, controllo di gestione, preventivazione, business intelligence, gestione di database o supporto alla costruzione di offerte economiche.
Ottima padronanza di Excel, con utilizzo avanzato di formule, tabelle pivot, funzioni di ricerca, gestione di basi dati e strumenti di analisi.
Familiarità con strumenti digitali, sistemi gestionali, database o strumenti di business intelligence.
Conoscenza della lingua inglese; la conoscenza anche della lingua francese rappresenta un plus.
Precisione, metodo, riservatezza, curiosità verso le nuove tecnologie, spirito critico nell’utilizzo degli strumenti digitali e predisposizione al lavoro in team.




Sede di lavoro: provincia di Milano, zona nord-ovest

Saranno prese in considerazione solo candidature corredate da CV completo.




Agenzia per il lavoro - Ricerca e Selezione del Personale

Autorizzazione ANPAL n° 000007 del 22/01/2024

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Your mission:

As a Data Analyst in the E2E Quality department, you will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting complex data sets to help drive data-driven business decisions. You will work closely with various departments to understand their data needs, provide insights, and develop data strategies that improve customer quality and business performance. Your ability to turn data into actionable information will be key in supporting our organization’s quality and efficiency.




Job location: Brussels or Gosselies or Ans.




Your main responsibilities:

Gather and process both structured and unstructured data from various sources including databases, APIs, and raw data files thats contribute to the company data lake.
Challenge any assumption and perform data exploration, cleaning and preprocessing to ensure data integrity, quality, and relevant usability.
Analyse large data sets to identify trends, patterns, and correlations relevant to business objectives by leveraging on statistical methods and data mining.
Translate complex technical data into simple usable indicators and perform in depth analysis delivering understandable findings that will trigger actionable business recommendations.
Create visualizations and dashboards to represent data findings in a clear and concise manner to stakeholders, including management and other departments.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business challenges and develop data-driven solutions to improve the customer experience, strengthen the technical leadership and optimize resource allocation.
Automate repetitive tasks and processes using scripts and macros or building simple frameworks.




Your profile:

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science
Minimum 3 years of experience in a similar function
Experience with statistical software and database management (e.g. BigQuery, SQL, Python)
Proficiency in BI tools (e.g. PowerBI, Google Looker, Tableau)
Experience with ETL within Cloud environments (e.g. GCP, DataForm, Matillon, Alteryx, AWS Redshit)
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail and high level of accuracy
Excellent communication and presentation skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Fluent French & English. Dutch would be a plus




Join Our Dynamic Team!

We invite you to work in a collaborative and stimulating environment, engaging with exciting AI projects. Enjoy the flexibility to work from Brussels, Ans, Gosselies, or remotely from home, in accordance with our internal policies.




You will make the difference in this highly innovative vibe. As a result, you will develop your full potential by working with highly skilled colleagues and through continuous training. Moreover, you can count on a highly competitive and versatile compensation (market competitive salary, company car or legal mobility budget, homeworking and net allowance, performance bonus, meal vouchers) and benefits package.




Inspired? Please submit your CV and we will get back to you to discuss the next steps.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We are looking for a Data Analytics Contractor to join a high-impact data transformation programme. You'll play a key role in modernising our analytics platform, helping migrate and enhance a large portfolio of Power BI dashboards while working with the latest Microsoft data technologies.




What You'll Be Doing

Deliver Power BI dashboard migration and modernisation projects.
Develop and optimise Power BI reports, semantic models and data models.
Build and maintain scalable data transformation pipelines using DBT where applicable.
Work within Microsoft Fabric to deliver modern analytics solutions.
Collaborate with product teams to migrate and enhance 40–50 business-critical dashboards.
Ensure data quality, performance and best practices across reporting solutions.
Support the implementation of modern BI architecture and analytics capabilities.




We're Looking for Two Types of Specialists




Option 1 – Data Engineering / DBT Specialist

You'll ideally have experience with:

DBT
SQL
Data transformation and modelling
Microsoft Fabric
Modern data engineering practices




Option 2 – Power BI & Fabric Specialist

You'll ideally have experience with:

Power BI development and modelling
Microsoft Fabric
Dashboard migration and modernisation
Semantic models
Tabular Editor
Performance optimisation




Essential Skills

Strong SQL skills
Commercial experience with Power BI
Experience working within Microsoft Fabric
Experience delivering dashboard migration or BI modernisation projects
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work independently in a fast-paced delivery environment




Desirable Skills

DBT
Tabular Editor
Power BI data modelling
Unity Catalog
End-to-end experience across modern Microsoft data platforms




What We're Looking For

We're not looking for unicorns—we're looking for experienced professionals who can deliver.

You don't need experience across every technology listed above. If you're particularly strong in either DBT and data engineering or Power BI, Fabric and reporting, we'd still love to hear from you.

This is a fast-paced project where practical delivery experience, collaboration and the ability to hit the ground running are more important than ticking every box.

If you're passionate about modern data platforms and enjoy delivering high-quality analytics solutions, we'd love to hear from you.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:

I'm currently supporting a global organisation on the search for a Senior Data Analyst to join a long-term data transformation programme.




📍 Fully Remote (Poland preferred, Czech Republic & UK considered)

This is an excellent opportunity for a Senior Data Analyst who enjoys working at the intersection of business and technology. ✅ SQL (Advanced)

✅ Python (Pandas)

✅ Cloud Platforms

✅ Tableau, Power BI or Qlik

✅ Strong stakeholder management and communication skills

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Can’t wait to make an impact on the world? You’re not alone. Join us in driving progress in the working world and beyond.

Your journey with us

The Tax Data & Process Team is looking for an experienced consultant to strengthen their team (Data2insight) in a wide range of analytics projects related to strategy, operations, and financial performance within the Tax landscape.

You will take ownership of client workstreams, shape engagement approaches, and act as a trusted advisor on how to turn fragmented tax data into a strategic asset. You will gain exposure to multiple industries with a chance to choose a focus and help to shape Deloitte market offerings. 

Under the direction of a Manager or Lead, you will be:


Managing tax data readiness assessments
Designing end-to-end tax data journeys and identifying control gaps and automation opportunities
Architecting data transformation and migration approaches
Building, configuring and analyzing tax data sets to be used for modeling, clustering, segmentation, and data mining
Delivering analytical insights
Using a variety of technologies for process analysis and design and data analytics
Developing tax dashboard and insight layers that connect operations data to strategic decision-making
Evaluating and recommending AI tools and platforms for tax data analysis and compliance monitoring
Contributing to the development of AI-powered tax insights and advisory offerings
Mentoring junior team members and contributing to offering development, thought leadership, and go-to market strategy.


Let's Talk About You


You have 2 to 5 years of professional experience
Relevant experience in Data Science within corporate Finance and/ or Accounting.
You are a team player with strong communication skills with the ability to tailor your presentation style to different levels of the organization
You have an intellectual curiosity in combination with outstanding analytical skills
You have hands-on experience with data analysis, ETL processes, reconciliation logic, BI/Dashboarding tools etc.
You have a genuine interest / passion in tax technology, regulatory change and the evolving role of data in tax
Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and their application in finance and tax
Understanding of data governance, quality, and ethics in AI-driven solutions
You are structured and process minded
You have a true willingness and ability to work as part of an integrated, enthusiastic and multidisciplinary team
You’re open to work in an international environment and to work abroad if needed
You’re fluent in English. Dutch and/or French is a plus


As a member of our Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) team, you will be part of a team that consists of people with diverse backgrounds. Some of us are data scientists, others are SAP system specialists and others are finance/tax process generalists. What unites us is our mission to solve complex finance/tax problems focusing on processes and data supported with cutting edge technology. Through this we unlock value to our client’s tax teams by bringing efficiencies in their day-to-day processes.

Who is Deloitte?

We provide industry-leading audit and assurance, tax and legal, consulting and related services. We are committed to driving innovation across offerings to help our clients address their challenges, while giving our professionals opportunities to learn and grow in this era of transformation.

In Belgium, +5000 dedicated professionals active in +10 offices, take great pride in bringing multidisciplinary expertise to a wide variety of clients, from national and international companies, small, fast-growing and large organizations to public institutions and governmental authorities.

Why Deloitte?

Be the true you! We foster diversity and inclusion and encourage you to bring your authentic self to work. Explore, question and collaborate while building a career that inspires and energises you.

Never stop growing! Diversity of thought makes us stronger. At Deloitte, we tailor a personalized learning experience, offering you the opportunity to grow at your own pace and achieve maximum impact.

We practice what we preach! As a Purpose-led organisation, at the heart of everything we do is a set of timeless principles and unifying values .

Life looks different for each of us, so we created a varied benefits package that you can tap into:


My Benefits My Choice, a flexible rewards plan tailored to your lifestyle and priorities
Sustainable transport options offered by Mobility@Deloitte
Flexible work arrangements for all and initiatives supported by Parents & Caregivers @Deloitte
Wellbeing tips and activities powered by Energise@Deloitte
Topped off with other health benefits and insurance opportunities


Empowering our employees with flexible work arrangements remains essential in today's reality:


Hybrid workplace: combination of home office and on-site (+10 offices in Belgium or client's premises).
Part-time employment: all our jobs are open to full-time or part-time work under a 90% or 80% regime.


Join us to make an impact together! Apply now!

  • Mentoring junior team members and contributing to offering development, thought leadership, and go-to market strategy.

Let's Talk About You

  • You have 2 to 5 years of professional experience
  • Relevant experience in Data Science within corporate Finance and/ or Accounting.
  • You are a team player with strong communication skills with the ability to tailor your presentation style to different levels of the organization
  • You have an intellectual curiosity in combination with outstanding analytical skills
  • You have hands-on experience with data analysis, ETL processes, reconciliation logic, BI/Dashboarding tools etc.
  • You have a genuine interest / passion in tax technology, regulatory change and the evolving role of data in tax
  • Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and their application in finance and tax
  • Understanding of data governance, quality, and ethics in AI-driven solutions
  • You are structured and process minded
  • You have a true willingness and ability to work as part of an integrated, enthusiastic and multidisciplinary team
  • You’re open to work in an international environment and to work abroad if needed
  • You’re fluent in English. Dutch and/or French is a plus

As a member of our Tax Technology Consulting (TTC) team, you will be part of a team that consists of people with diverse backgrounds. Some of us are data scientists, others are SAP system specialists and others are finance/tax process generalists. What unites us is our mission to solve complex finance/tax problems focusing on processes and data supported with cutting edge technology. Through this we unlock value to our client’s tax teams by bringing efficiencies in their day-to-day processes.

Who is Deloitte?

We provide industry-leading audit and assurance, tax and legal, consulting and related services. We are committed to driving innovation across offerings to help our clients address their challenges, while giving our professionals opportunities to learn and grow in this era of transformation.

In Belgium, +5000 dedicated professionals active in +10 offices, take great pride in bringing multidisciplinary expertise to a wide variety of clients, from national and international companies, small, fast-growing and large organizations to public institutions and governmental authorities.

Why Deloitte?

Be the true you! We foster diversity and inclusion and encourage you to bring your authentic self to work. Explore, question and collaborate while building a career that inspires and energises you.

Never stop growing! Diversity of thought makes us stronger. At Deloitte, we tailor a personalized learning experience, offering you the opportunity to grow at your own pace and achieve maximum impact.

We practice what we preach! As a Purpose-led organisation, at the heart of everything we do is a set of timeless principles and unifying values .

Life looks different for each of us, so we created a varied benefits package that you can tap into:

  • My Benefits My Choice, a flexible rewards plan tailored to your lifestyle and priorities
  • Sustainable transport options offered by Mobility@Deloitte
  • Flexible work arrangements for all and initiatives supported by Parents & Caregivers @Deloitte
  • Wellbeing tips and activities powered by Energise@Deloitte
  • Topped off with other health benefits and insurance opportunities

Empowering our employees with flexible work arrangements remains essential in today's reality:

  • Hybrid workplace: combination of home office and on-site (+10 offices in Belgium or client's premises).
  • Part-time employment: all our jobs are open to full-time or part-time work under a 90% or 80% regime.

Join us to make an impact together! Apply now!

Title: Data Analyst / Data Visualisation
Description:
Data Analyst / Data Visualisation Consultant

Who We Are

NORRIQ is a leading international consulting firm headquartered in Denmark and Belgium, with 350+ consultants driving business transformation through technology. Our Financial Services practice includes 100+ specialists supporting banks, insurers, and financial institutions in navigating regulatory challenges, embracing emerging technologies, and meeting evolving client demands. We prioritize growth, innovation, and excellence, offering abundant opportunities for professional development and collaboration.

The Opportunity

NORRIQ is seeking to grow its Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence team with additional Data Analyst / Data Visualisation Consultants to improve the business performance of financial institutions. You will help our clients to optimize the value they can get from their internal and external data, through improved business performance monitoring and enhanced reporting quality and readability. Join us to work on impactful projects that shape the future of finance.

Responsibilities


Collecting and interpreting internal and external data about customer behaviour via the digital platforms (Web and mobile) and their digital transactions with the bank.
Translate data insight into actionable recommendations in order to coordinate the business needs around data and improve the bank’s digital and marketing strategy and optimize future campaigns.
Collect, analyze, and interpret large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and correlations
Develop and maintain complex data models, databases, data warehouses and data marts .
Create data visualizations and reports to communicate insights to stakeholders.
Perform data quality checks and ensure data integrity, develop and implement data governance policies and procedures
Stay up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies in data analysis and visualization


Your Profile


Master’s degree (or equivalent work experience) in mathematics or statistics, business intelligence, computer engineering, economy.
1-3 years of experience in data projects, preferably within the financial services industry.
Technical Expertise & Tooling: SQL (mandatory), SAS (nice to have), Python & R (to support our AI team), Reporting & Visualisation tools (Power BI, Tableau, Adobe Analytics, ...),.
ETL Processes: Affinity with ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes, including an understanding of data preparation, cleansing, and integration from multiple sources.
Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving and analytical abilities to translate complex data into actionable insights.
Business Analysis Skills: Experience in requirements gathering, process design and developing action plans.
AI knowledge: AI knowledge & interest to connect easily with our data scientist and machine learning engineers.
Communication & Collaboration: Excellent communication skills; ability to work well in cross-functional teams and engage effectively with stakeholders.
Languages: Fluent in English and native in French or Dutch.


What We Offer


Dynamic Work Environment: High-impact projects with leading financial institutions in a fast-growing consulting firm.
Career Development: Continuous learning and growth opportunities to advance your career.
Collaborative Culture: A supportive, innovative team environment that encourages new ideas and professional development.
Global Exposure: International experience working on cross-border projects that shape the financial services industry.


Why Join Us?

At NORRIQ, we are shaping the future of finance through transformation and innovation. If you're passionate about improving financial processes, driving change, and delivering value to clients, this is the perfect opportunity for you.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Kronos by EPSA – Boost your career!




The EPSA Group is a European performance specialist. Recognized for its technical know-how and the diversity of its business expertise, the EPSA Group optimizes its customers' financial, operational and sustainable results. Its solutions platform focuses on purchasing performance, innovation financing and energy and environmental transition. An international partner, the EPSA Group employs nearly 5,000 people and is present in over 40 countries.




As part of this mission, Kronos by EPSA provides agile and specialized support in Project Management, Supply Chain and Procurement through interim management and expert resourcing.




Kronos by EPSA connects highly skilled professionals with leading organizations, enabling them to reinforce their teams, accelerate transformation projects, and deliver strategic results. Whether it’s short-term operational support or long-term category management, Kronos by EPSA bridges talent and opportunity with precision and purpose.




About the Opportunity

Our client, a major player in critical infrastructure and the energy sector, is looking for a Data Analyst to support strategic studies related to energy markets, security of supply, and the energy transition.

You will join a team responsible for developing market and adequacy analyses that help shape the future of the electricity system. Working with large-scale simulation outputs and market data, you will contribute to improving data transparency and transforming complex datasets into meaningful insights and visual stories.

This role is ideal for someone who combines strong technical data skills with a genuine interest in energy systems and market dynamics.




Your Responsibilities

Design and improve data management processes, including data warehouses and data pipelines.
Explore, process, and analyze large datasets generated by energy market simulations.
Develop and maintain Python-based tools used for data analysis and reporting.
Create impactful visualizations and dashboards using Power BI and other visualization technologies.
Benchmark industry best practices and existing visualization platforms.
Transform simulation outputs into clear and actionable insights for both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Identify trends, inconsistencies, and opportunities through advanced data analysis.
Present findings and visualizations to stakeholders and management, gathering feedback and continuously improving outputs.
Contribute to the design of user-friendly interfaces enabling dynamic exploration of complex datasets.
Support data engineering initiatives and integrations between tools and platforms.




Your Profile

Experience

Minimum 3 years of experience in Data Analytics, Data Engineering, Data Science, Business Intelligence, or a related field.
Proven experience working with large datasets and transforming data into meaningful insights.
Experience creating dashboards, reports, and data visualizations for business stakeholders.

Technical Skills

Must-Have

Strong Python skills.
Experience with Power BI.
Solid understanding of data processing, data transformation, and data analysis.
Experience building reusable scripts and analytical tools.

Nice-to-Have

Experience with React.js.
Experience with simulation models, optimization tools, or market modeling software.
Knowledge of ANTARES or similar energy market simulation tools.
Experience with data warehouse design and data pipeline development.

Domain Knowledge

Strong interest in energy markets, electricity systems, or the energy transition.
Understanding of energy market dynamics, power systems, or infrastructure sectors is a significant asset.

Soft Skills

Analytical and critical thinker with a strong attention to detail.
Curious and proactive mindset.
Ability to communicate complex information in a simple and visual way.
Comfortable working both independently and collaboratively.
Passion for solving complex problems through data.

Languages

Professional proficiency in English.
Good command of Dutch and/or French.




Mission Conditions

Location: Brussels (hybrid working model)
Contract: payroll

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
WHAT IS CREAM ALL ABOUT?

We could be a Cream Factory, a cooking blog or even a detective agency…

But in reality, we are a Business & Technology consulting company, active in large organizations and industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Telecom, Energy, & Transport.

The Cream recipe

• 1/3 Personal development • 1/3 Collective intelligence • 1/3 Intrapreneurship • Bonus ingredient: some passionate colleagues

YOUR FUTURE PROJECTS :

Like Benjamin, Data Analyst at Cream, you work close to business teams and help them turn data into concrete insights that support decision-making. Your tasks will be :

• Understand business needs and translate them into analytical questions

• Collect, clean and analyse large datasets

• Identify trends, patterns and performance drivers

• Build dashboards, reports and analytical outputs

• Support business users in data interpretation

• Contribute to the selection and use of analytics tools

• Work closely with business, IT and data teams

WHAT DO WE EXPECT FROM OUR CONSULTANT ?

• At least 2 years of experience in data analysis AND Master’s degree

• Experience with SQL and BI tools (Power BI, Qlik, Tableau, …)

• Knowledge of Python or SAS

• Fluent in French and English; a good level of Dutch is an asset

• Ability to explain data insights in a clear and business-oriented way

• Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset

WHY SHOULD YOU TASTE THE LIME FLAVOR ?

A strong learning environment: tribes, training budget
Career follow-up with dedicated Business Managers and an associate plan
Attractive benefits package (mobility plan, meal vouchers, insurances,...)
Hybrid working model: client working, home working & Cream working
Strong CSR commitments, with recognized labels in environmental responsibility and diversity & inclusion.
A consulting company of around 200 Creamers, located in the center of Brussels




Our recruitment process is clear and structured, with three steps and feedback throughout.

Cream Consulting is committed to equal opportunities. If you need any specific accommodation to fully participate in the recruitment process or the interview, please let us know.

Think this role is a match? Apply and let’s talk, or explore our other opportunities at Cream.

Title: BI / Data Analyst
Description:
Infogene Belgium (part of Vulcain Engineering Group) is looking for a BI / Data Analyst to join its teams.

In this role, you will leverage data to generate meaningful insights, support decision-making and improve operational performance across organizations.

You will support digital transformation initiatives across the Energy, Life Sciences and Industrial sectors, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams and business stakeholders.




ABOUT THE POSITION

Understand business needs and translate them into reporting and data solutions
Design, develop and maintain interactive dashboards, reports and KPIs for business users
Collect, clean and consolidate data from multiple sources to ensure accuracy and reliability
Analyze data to identify trends, opportunities, risks and performance improvement areas
Collaborate closely with Business Stakeholders, Data Engineers, Project Managers and Solution Architects to deliver valuable insights
Support data governance initiatives by promoting data quality, consistency and best practices
Communicate findings and recommendations through clear data visualizations and business-oriented presentations
Contribute to the continuous improvement of reporting frameworks, analytical models and decision-support tools




ABOUT YOU

Master’s degree in Business Analytics, Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science or related field
Between 3 and 8 years of experience in Business Intelligence, Data Analysis or Reporting projects
Strong experience with reporting, dashboarding and data visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau or similar)
Good understanding of data modelling, data quality and business performance measurement
Comfortable working in collaborative and agile environments
Professional proficiency in English is required. Fluency in French and/or Dutch is highly appreciated
Experience within Energy, Utilities, Life Sciences or Industrial environments is considered a strong asset




Nice to have : SQL, Microsoft Excel, DAX, Power Query, Tableau / Qlik Sense, Data Visualization, KPI Reporting




ABOUT US

Infogene is a fast-growing consulting and digital transformation company specialized in complex and highly regulated industries. We support leading companies across Life Sciences, Banking & Insurance, Energy & Environment, and Luxury & Retail, delivering high-value IT and business solutions.

Originally rooted in healthcare, Infogene has developed strong expertise in environments where precision, compliance, and innovation are key, helping clients tackle strategic challenges from digital transformation to operational excellence.

Present in France, Belgium, and Switzerland, we offer the best of both worlds: the flexibility of a growing company combined with the strength of a leading international group.

At Infogene, we believe our success comes from our people, fostering a culture of ownership, collaboration, and continuous development.




Our activities focus on consultancy services, delivering expertise in three main areas:

IT & Digital Transformation
Industrial & Technology Systems
Life Sciences & Compliance




WHY WOULD YOU APPLY

Infogene is part of the Vulcain Engineering Group, a leading European player in engineering, with over 7,000 employees across 20 countries, offering access to large-scale projects, strong technical ecosystems, and international opportunities.
A competitive package aligned with your experience
A human-sized and fast-growing environment where you benefit from close management, strong team spirit, and real career development opportunities.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
ACENSI is looking for a Data Analyst for one of their client based un Brussels :




Context

On top of the development of the grid, asset and system management and market facilitation above mentioned, the TSO in Belgium is also responsible to conduct several security of supply studies (short, medium and long term), vision studies, cost benefit analysis of future grid projects... Those studies are based on economic dispatch tools, which evaluate the need for additional capacity, the economic outputs or the margin available in the system for every hour of the year.




Performing these studies are amongst the main tasks of the team ‘SMA – Scenarios, Market & Adequacy analysis’ department.




This RFP aims to contract one consultant (that will work on site) to support the team in realizing several tasks focused on enhancing the transparency of data published by SMA and developing clear, insightful, and impactful visuals from it.




Our client is therefore looking for a pro-active, “data geek” and “energy geek”. The candidate should have knowledge of data mining, data gathering/processing (mainly in Python), data visualization (PowerBI, React.js…) and ideally an economic dispatch tool such as ANTARES. This assignment also requires a minimum knowledge of energy systems.




Requirements

The consultant will help to perform different tasks within the SMA team :

Improve data management process at SMA (set up data warehouse, data pipelines ;
Explore large amount of data coming out of the simulations ;
Benchmarking visualizations from other equivalent studies
Interactive dashboard), RTE (Analyses et données),...
Benchmarking visualization already available within SMA ;
Create visuals from given simulation output, including writing and updating appropriate scripts ;
Present and iterate upon the created visuals with key stakeholders/management to ensure they fulfill their intended purpose
Create visuals to compare different studies together or with historical data; - Create/Update scripts to identify inconsistencies in input/output data from the simulations ;
Propose user-friendly interface to dynamically explore the data, that could be publicly shared




Service requirements (hard skills and soft skils)

Hard skills

Python (must have) Python is extensively used in existing tools at SMA. Python is a general-purpose programming language whose design philosophy emphasizes code readability. The outcome of the project must be compatible with the existing toolchains
PowerBI (must have) PowerBI is the central tool used at SMA for visualisation. The project should build on the tools/visuals already available within SMA
React.js (nice to have) React.js is used within SMA for specific types of visualization. Knowledge of React would be a plus
ANTARES (mainly the input/output interface but also a general knowledge of economic dispatch tool is a ‘nice to have’) ANTARES is an economic dispatch tool developed by RTE, the French TSO. In the application’s core is an economic dispatch tool for the electricity market. Antares allows to simulate the electricity market on an hourly basis. Any experience with market simulations can be valued here, including other solvers. A minimum knowledge of energy systems is also required. Website: https://antares-simulator.org/




Soft Skills

Medior profile: 3 yrs experience minimum.
The consultant has knowledge of and interest in the energy market;
Ability to work independently and in a team;
The consultant has an analytical and innovative mind




About the profil

You like diving into data and create clear, insightful, and impactful visuals;
Interested to deliver high quality tools to improve the team’s functioning;
You are looking to invest a team on the medium term where you could face challenging projects and grow an expertise

Title: Data Analyst Intern
Description:
Syensqo is all about chemistry. We’re not just referring to chemical reactions here, but also to the magic that occurs when the brightest minds get to work together. This is where our true strength lies. In you. In your future colleagues and in all your differences. And of course, in your ideas to improve lives while preserving our planet’s beauty for the generations to come.
We are looking for:
A Data Analyst Intern who will contribute in building our next-generation industrial performance management system supporting our strategic operational decisions. As a Data Analyst Intern, you will be primarily responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining Power BI dashboards that support critical decision-making across the operations.
We count on you for:

Designing and developing interactive Power BI dashboards to monitor and communicate key industrial performance metrics.
Collecting, cleaning, and transforming data from different sources to ensure accurate and reliable insights.
Collaborating with operations managers, business leaders and data experts to understand reporting requirements.
Optimizing dashboards for performance and user experience.
Exploring opportunities for predictive analytics, contributing to the development of forward-looking indicators to support operational decision-making.
Documenting processes and providing training materials for dashboard users.


You will bring:

Currently pursuing a degree in Data Analytics, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or a related field.
Familiarity with Power BI and basic knowledge of how to design clear and effective visualizations.
Proficiency in at least one programming language (SQL or Python).
Curious and exploring mindset
Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively.
Fluent in English.
Experience with Microsoft Fabric is considered a nice to have.


You will get:

The Belgian monthly base salary range reasonably expected to be paid for this new hire is: 350.00€ to 500.00€. Actual compensation will be determined based on factors such as skills, experience, qualification, internal equity and tipe of contract and can ultimately be more or less than the posted salary range.
A meaningful internship experience beyond academic learning, where you are fully integrated into a team and encouraged to explore, ask questions, and contribute with impact.
Food allowance.
Teleworking a few days a week.
Access to a training platform for all employees.
Participation in various on-site events, including well-being sessions, seminars, and other employee activities.


Additional information:

Location: Brussels, Belgium
Hybrid working model
4 month internship contract
Start date: September 1st


About Us

Syensqo is a science company developing groundbreaking solutions that enhance the way we live, work, travel and play. Inspired by the scientific councils which Ernest Solvay initiated in 1911, we bring great minds together to push the limits of science and innovation for the benefit of our customers, with a diverse, global team of more than 13,000 associates. Our solutions contribute to safer, cleaner, and more sustainable products found in homes, food and consumer goods, planes, cars, batteries, smart devices and health care applications. Our innovation power enables us to deliver on the ambition of a circular economy and explore breakthrough technologies that advance humanity.
At Syensqo, we seek to promote unity and not uniformity. We value the diversity that individuals bring and we invite you to consider a future with us, regardless of background, age, gender, national origin, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, ability or identity. We encourage individuals who may require any assistance or accommodations to let us know to ensure a seamless application experience. We are here to support you throughout the application journey and want to ensure all candidates are treated equally. If you are unsure whether you meet all the criteria or qualifications listed in the job description, we still encourage you to apply.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Playrix — одна из самых успешных компаний по разработке мобильных игр, входит в топ-3 компаний-разработчиков мобильных игр в мире. Наши игры установили 2,3 миллиарда раз (треть населения Земли), каждый день в них играет более 30 миллионов людей!

У нас большие планы на развитие и рост наших проектов, именно поэтому мы ищем сильнейших экспертов в наши команды.




Мы ищем продуктового аналитика, которому доверим развитие продукта, выстраивание системы управления данными, улучшение процессов и поиск точек роста для бизнеса. Решая вместе с нами сложные аналитические задачи, вы сможете напрямую влиять на развитие мировых хитов в mobile gaming.




За каждым продуктом стоит сильная команда аналитики, но взаимодействие будет не только внутри ее. Безусловно, предстоит заниматься классическими задачами любого аналитика игрового продукта: анализировать игровую экономику, баланс, поведение игроков и многое другое. Однако самая основная и важная задача Data Analyst в команде - обеспечение процессов принятия решений, которые приведут к устойчивому долгосрочному продуктовому развитию. Также в задачах:

проведение АБ-тестов и офлайн приемок новых алгоритмов;
интерпретация полученных результатов, формулирование выводов и новых гипотез;
задача со звездочкой - предсказание того, как изменение одного из факторов или группы скажется на притоке, оттоке и балансе ресурсов у игроков разных сегментов




Наш стек:

Отличный технический стэк (JupyterHub или databricks + pyspark): современный, переиспользуемый в других компаниях. Все, в чем сотрудник прокачивается работая в Playrix, впоследствии не теряет актуальности и легко монетизируется.

По инструментам не ограничиваем, ресурсы выделяем быстро, весь AWS в нашем распоряжении
Собираем данные через Appsflyer(маркетинговые) и Amplitude (продуктовые)
Сырые данные в S3, ETL на Airflow, подготовленные таблицы и витрины в Redshift. Data Quality, lineage, catalog – Monte Carlo
Аналитики крутят данные SQL-ем и Python-ом в Jupyter/Databricks ноутбуках, прототипы дашбордов делают в Tableau
Развиваем self-service и аналитические продукты для потребителей данных, аналитиков разгружаем от рутины




Мы ожидаем что у вас есть:

диплом выпускника технического вуза, а вместе с ним отличная математическая подготовка — знание теории вероятностей и прикладной статистики;
опыт работы с в крупной технической или ритейл компании с видимыми результатами профессионального роста;
опыт в А/В тестировании, анализе данных, продуктовой/маркетинговой аналитике;
уверенные знания и опыт работы с SQL и Python;
ориентация на бизнес, умение находить прикладное решение в ограниченное время, не усложнять там, где это не нужно;
проактивная позиция, умение и способность брать на себя ответственность за результат, способность действовать в ситуации неопределенности.




У нас классно, потому что у нас есть:

по-настоящему большой масштаб: сотни миллионов игроков, петабайты данных (храним все за последние 7 лет) и маркетинг ограниченный эффективностью, а не бюджетом
data-driven подход – считаем всё, проводим эксперименты и принимаем решения по данным везде, где это возможно.
все выводы делаем с опорой на статистику, аналитики задают стандарты принятия решений. Даже для сотрудников, далеких от аналитики, доверительные интервалы – не пустой звук.
возможность менять процессы и подходы на более эффективные без долгих согласований и бюрократии.




Мы предлагаем:

Гибкость в работе: Для большинства позиций у нас гибкий график и удалённый формат работы. Мы ориентируемся на результат, а не на место или способ выполнения задач.




Забота о здоровье и well-being:

Предоставляем ДМС для сотрудников, их партнеров и детей, компенсируем онлайн-сессии с психологом.
Сохраняем 100% зарплату во время отпуска или больничного без лишних справок. А для особых случаев предоставляем дополнительные выходные.
Поддерживаем здоровый образ жизни и компенсируем покупку спортивных абонементов и подписку на фитнес-приложения.




Развитие и обучение:

Оплачиваем участие в профильных конференциях и курсах, проводим внутренние конференции.
Предлагаем скидки на курсы английского языка и языков стран присутствия компании.




Ивенты и мерч:

Регулярно проводим развлекательные и рабочие мероприятия в офлайн режиме: встречи команд, крупные корпоративные вечеринки и более лайтовые пати в офисах.
Также регулярно проводим развлекательные конкурсы, квизы, хакатоны, спортивные челленджи в режиме онлайн.
Собственный магазин мерча с внутренней валютой, где можно купить уникальные подарки. Валюту дарим на значимые даты, также ее можно заработать, участвуя в мероприятиях и брендовых активностях.




Отправляя отклик на нашу вакансию, вы соглашаетесь, что ваши персональные данные, собранные во время собеседований в Playrix, будут обрабатываться в соответствии с условиями (https://playrix.com/candidate-privacy). Вы можете отправить запрос в отношении ваших персональных данных по адресу: job@playrix.com.

  • Также регулярно проводим развлекательные конкурсы, квизы, хакатоны, спортивные челленджи в режиме онлайн.
  • Собственный магазин мерча с внутренней валютой, где можно купить уникальные подарки. Валюту дарим на значимые даты, также ее можно заработать, участвуя в мероприятиях и брендовых активностях.
